value.effect: Every played card counts in scoring
+10 chips Can be used as any suit
Reroll Boss Blind 1 time per Ante, $10 per roll
Hearts and Diamonds count as the same suit, Spades and Clubs count as the same suit
Adds the number of times poker hand has been played this run to Mult

big.name: Big Blind
big.tag_effect: Next base edition shop Joker is free and becomes Holographic

small.name: Small Blind
small.tag_effect: Gives $1 per unused discard this run (Will give $29)
